generated_exposure.exposure_text: Our civil defense systems are dangerously underfunded, and it's putting all of us at risk. While other countries invest in protecting their citizens, we're left vulnerable because of bureaucratic neglect. It's time to demand accountability from those who prioritize politics over public safety. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
